task.description: The task name to verify against (e.g. "people")

answer_file.description: Absolute path to the JSON file containing the answer data

api_request_body.description: POST to /api/* with an inline JSON body. For a single call only — if calling the same endpoint for each item in a dataset, use api_batch instead.

body_json.description: JSON-encoded string of the request body (will be parsed before sending), skip apiKey field, it's gonna be injected automatically

api_request_file.description: POST to /api/* with body loaded from a JSON file

body_file.description: Absolute path to a JSON file for the request body

api_batch.description: POST to /api/* for each row in a CSV/JSON array file. Preferred over multiple api_request_body calls — use whenever a dataset needs the same endpoint called per item. Apikey auto-injected. Calls made sequentially.

data_file.description: Absolute path to a CSV or JSON array file. Each row/item becomes one API call.

field_map_json.description: JSON object mapping source field names to target field names, e.g. {"born":"birthYear"}. Unmapped fields pass through. Default: "{}" (no renaming).

output_file.description: Absolute path to write the results JSON array
